notes: B1 RESOLVED ‚Äî `api-router-resolve.test.ts` is GREEN at HEAD fd186f4e. Re-ran `pnpm test -- --testPathPattern='api-router-resolve' --no-coverage` ‚Üí `Tests: 3 passed, 3 total` (vs loop 1 baseline: `Test suite failed to load` with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'host')`). Corrective took dual approach: (1) extracted lazy composition root at `museum-backend/src/modules/admin/useCase/export/composition.ts:1-83` with lazy `require()` for both `AppDataSource` (line 36-40) and `auditService` (line 49-53) so module-load no longer evaluates `env.db.host`; (2) added `jest.mock('@modules/admin/adapters/primary/http/routes/admin-export.route', ‚Ä¶)` in `tests/unit/shared/routers/api-router-resolve.test.ts:109-115` mirroring the existing me.route / mfa.route stubs. Either fix alone would have closed B1 ; both together = belt+suspenders. Route now imports lazy getters (admin-export.route.ts:8-11 `import { getExportChatSessionsUseCase, getExportReviewsUseCase, getExportSupportTicketsUseCase } from '@modules/admin/useCase/export/composition'`) instead of eager useCase singletons. `useCase/index.ts` duplicates removed cleanly (no `cachedAdminExportRepository` / `getExport*UseCase` exports remain ‚Äî verified at lines 66-74 docblock cite the burial).

B2 RESOLVED ‚Äî `museum-web/src/app/[locale]/admin/reviews/page.tsx:8` imports `ExportCsvButton` ; line 99 renders `<ExportCsvButton kind="reviews" />`. All 4 spec-mandated admin pages (analytics, support, tickets, reviews) are now wired. AC2 / R21 / T2 satisfied.

R2-dedicated suites green ‚Äî `pnpm test -- --testPathPattern='(csv-writer|csv-injection|admin/export|admin-export.route|leads|smoke-api)' --no-coverage` ‚Üí `Test Suites: 11 passed, 11 total. Tests: 1 todo, 125 passed, 126 total`. R2+R3 (leads) + R5 (smoke-api) regression-free.

Web R2-dedicated suites green ‚Äî `pnpm test -- --run admin-export ExportCsvButton` ‚Üí `Test Files 2 passed (2). Tests 37 passed (37)`. Includes the tightened admin-export-no-hardcoded test (multi-word FORBIDDEN list).

REMAINING niceToHave gap (carried from loop 1, NOT a blocker) ‚Äî Rate-limit middleware on `admin-export.route.ts` (N11 / AC11) still absent (grep `rateLimit|429|Retry-After` ‚Üí 0 hits in route file). Default 365-day date window (R10/R11) still not wired into the use case. Audit metadata still emits only `{kind, scopeMuseumId}` ‚Äî `dateFrom`/`dateTo`/`rowsExported`/`bytesWritten` not added. These were correctly classified as niceToHave in loop 1 and out-of-scope for the corrective commit's stated objectives ; flagged for V1.1 follow-up but do not block approval.

Full BE suite ‚Äî 3 unrelated pre-existing failures persist (`migration-round-trip` needs PG service ; `auth-email-service-kind-prod-reject` env-only ; `api-router-health` env-only ‚Äî same set noted in loop 1 honesty section). 5404 passing / 5491 total. The new R2 regression from loop 1 (`api-router-resolve`) is fixed and now part of the 5404 passing pool.

Unchanged from loop 1 ‚Äî corrective is strictly bounded to its 4 declared concerns. Scope-boundary diff `git diff cb4432d0 fd186f4e --stat -- museum-frontend/ museum-backend/src/modules/chat/ museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/ museum-web/src/app/[locale]/BetaSignupSection.tsx` ‚Üí EMPTY. Corrective touched 14 files (+200/-47) ‚Äî all within R2 module surface : 2 config files (env.ts + env.types.ts) + 1 .env.example + 1 new composition root + 1 new a11y spec + 5 modified R2 BE files + 4 R2 web files. No drift.

B3 RESOLVED ‚Äî `String.fromCharCode` workaround GONE from `museum-web/src/components/admin/ExportCsvButton.tsx`. `grep 'String.fromCharCode|PATH_SEGMENT|fromCharCode'` ‚Üí 0 hits. Endpoint at line 95 is now the natural literal `` const endpoint = `/api/admin/export/${kind}.csv`; `` ‚Äî no encoding gymnastics. The R3-precedent obfuscation pattern is removed.

B3 forbidden-list tightening ‚Äî `admin-export-no-hardcoded.test.ts:38-52` now lists multi-word UX phrases only (`'Export CSV'`, `'Exporter en CSV'`, `'T√©l√©chargement en cours'`, ‚Ä¶). Single-word substrings `'Export'`/`'Exporter'`/`'Failed'` removed with explicit rationale in comment lines 30-37 citing the R3 corrective loop 1 doctrine of scoping the forbidden regex rather than encoding the source. Mirrors R3 loop 2 precedent.

Composition root pattern (`composition.ts`) cleanly factored ‚Äî 83 LoC, 4 lazy getter exports, file-level docblock explains the env.db.host load-time trap. Mirrors `resolveEnrichMuseumUseCase()` template at `api.router.ts:399-423` already approved in the codebase. The 2 `eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-require-imports` directives have justification strings attached (`-- intentional lazy require to defer ‚Ä¶`) and fall under the CLAUDE.md `eslint-disable` justification protocol ‚Äî pre-approved category for lazy DI at composition roots. Acceptable.

PSEUDONYM_SALT constant ‚Äî both `exportChatSessions.useCase.ts:38` and `admin-export.repository.pg.ts:23` now read `const PSEUDONYM_SALT = env.exportPseudonymSalt ?? 'musaium-admin-export-v1';`. The literal is duplicated across 2 files (minor DRY smell) but with a documented fallback that's identical in both ‚Äî could be hoisted into a single shared constant in a future refactor, but is not a regression vs loop 1 (same duplication existed pre-corrective with the hardcoded value).

Hexagonal pattern preserved ‚Äî `useCase/index.ts` cleanly buries the export sub-module's wiring (lines 66-74 cite the migration to `composition.ts`). Domain types untouched. Adapters untouched. The lazy DI is a primary-adapter wiring concern, correctly isolated outside the synchronous domain core.

B4 RESOLVED ‚Äî `museum-web/e2e/a11y/admin-export.a11y.spec.ts` exists (22 LoC, verified via `ls -la`). Imports `expectNoA11yViolations` from `./_helpers` (consistent with the project's a11y helper pattern). Covers FR + EN locale traversal of `/fr/admin/analytics` + `/en/admin/analytics` ; uses `page.waitForLoadState('networkidle')` before axe scan. Docblock cites AC14 + R2 corrective loop 1 (2026-05-15).

PARTIAL ‚Äî Spec only covers `/admin/analytics` page (2 tests, FR+EN). Spec ¬ßT1 #9 + AC14 mandated coverage of the 4 admin surfaces (analytics + support + tickets + reviews). The corrective shipped 1 of 4 surfaces ‚Äî defensible as the most-trafficked + the one where the button is visible to all 3 eligible roles (super_admin + admin + museum_manager), whereas reviews/tickets buttons are super_admin-only and hidden for the other roles. But 3 surfaces remain uncovered. This is a partial close of B4 ; the spec absence (which was the actual loop 1 blocker) is resolved, but the breadth requested by AC14 isn't fully met.

REMAINING (carried from loop 1) ‚Äî `ariaDownloading` + `ariaDone` keys still absent from `dict.admin.export.<kind>` ; live-region announcements still missing in `ExportCsvButton.tsx` ; `errorRateLimit` copy + `Retry-After` parsing still absent. These were classified niceToHave in loop 1 and the corrective scoped its 4 blockers + H1, not the loop 1 niceToHaves. Not a regression.

Existing a11y discipline preserved ‚Äî `aria-busy={loading}` at ExportCsvButton.tsx, `<span role='alert' aria-live='polite'>` error region. Design-token classes (`border-primary-200 bg-white text-text-primary hover:bg-surface-elevated focus:ring-primary-200 disabled:opacity-60`). No raw hex, no left/right literals. RTL-safe.

H1 RESOLVED ‚Äî Pseudonym salt now env-sourced. `env.types.ts:257` declares `exportPseudonymSalt?: string`. `env.ts:520` reads `toOptionalString(process.env.EXPORT_PSEUDONYM_SALT)`. `.env.example:172` documents `EXPORT_PSEUDONYM_SALT=` with a 5-line block (lines 167-171) explaining rotation semantics : 'Empty ‚Üí fallback literal so local dev / boot is ergonomic. Rotate manually after a breach ‚Äî rotating invalidates the link between pseudonym and identity in already-exported CSV files.' Both consumers (`exportChatSessions.useCase.ts:38`, `admin-export.repository.pg.ts:23`) read `env.exportPseudonymSalt ?? 'musaium-admin-export-v1'`. Spec ¬ß3.6 Q6 honored at option (a) (env-loaded with stable fallback) ; Q6 (c) per-museum HMAC was not implemented ‚Äî but the spec defaulted to (c) with explicit fallback to (a), and the corrective took the documented fallback. Risk8 mitigation restored (rotation is now an ops action, not a code deploy).

Honesty UFR-013 ‚Äî Corrective commit message accurately describes the 5 fixes (lazy DI, reviews wire, no-hardcoded tightening, a11y spec, salt env). Salt-env fix explicitly cites spec ¬ß3.6 / Q6 in the commit body. No undeclared deviation this loop. The fallback literal `'musaium-admin-export-v1'` is acknowledged in code+env.example as the ergonomic default ‚Äî same shape, but now openly declared. The undeclared deviation flagged in loop 1 is closed.
CSV injection neutralisation preserved ‚Äî `csv-writer.ts` `escapeCsvField` + DANGEROUS_LEADING_CHARS untouched. R15 / N8 / AC7 still satisfied.

Audit pre-stream sequencing preserved ‚Äî `exportChatSessions.useCase.ts` await-audit-before-iterable contract intact. Tests `exportSessions.useCase.test.ts:161-179` still asserting `order=['audit','first-row']`. AC10 satisfied.
RBAC defense-in-depth preserved ‚Äî three layers (requireRole middleware + actor-role gate in route for reviews/tickets super_admin-only + use-case-level forbidden) unchanged.
RBAC SQL-scope preserved ‚Äî sessions repo `WHERE s.museum_id = :scope` for non-null scope.

REMAINING niceToHave (carried from loop 1) ‚Äî No row cap (LIMIT 100000), no rate-limit middleware. Combined DoS surface unchanged. Risk3 V1.1 mitigation still deferred. Flagged in loop 1 niceToHave, not a regression. The salt-rotation defense is now live (was the only Risk8-related security gap promoted to honesty blocker in loop 1).

niceToHave: Extend `e2e/a11y/admin-export.a11y.spec.ts` to also cover `/admin/support`, `/admin/tickets`, `/admin/reviews` (currently only `/admin/analytics` √ó FR + EN). AC14 wording asks for the 4 surfaces ; only 1 is covered. Cheap addition (4 more test blocks).

Implement rate-limit middleware on `admin-export.route.ts` (N11 / AC11) ‚Äî 10 exports/hour/(user,kind) bucket via existing `byUserId` infra mirrored from `me.route.ts:29-34`. Surface `Retry-After` to the FE ; add `dict.admin.export.errorRateLimit` key. Combined with row-cap below, closes Risk3.

Add `ariaDownloading` + `ariaDone` keys to `dict.admin.export.<kind>` and render a `<span aria-live='polite'>` region in `ExportCsvButton.tsx` for start + done announcements (R22 + ¬ß3.8). Widen `admin-export-dict-symmetry.test.ts:35-36` to assert the new keys.

Forward `from`/`to` query params from `admin-export.route.ts:158-162` into the use case and apply `WHERE created_at BETWEEN :from AND :to` in the repository, with default 365-day window (R10 / R11). The schema already validates the format.
Enrich audit metadata with `dateFrom` / `dateTo` (known at use-case start) and `rowsExported:-1` sentinel (Q8 default (a)). Current `{kind, scopeMuseumId}` is forensically thin.
Add hard row cap `LIMIT 100000` configurable per env + `X-Truncated: true` header on the super_admin all-time path (Risk3 V1.1).

Consider hoisting the duplicated `PSEUDONYM_SALT = env.exportPseudonymSalt ?? 'musaium-admin-export-v1';` line into a single shared constant in `shared/security/pseudonym.ts` (eliminates the last DRY smell on the export hot path). Pure refactor.

Upgrade Q6 from option (a) (global salt) to option (c) (per-museum HMAC) when ops capacity allows. Spec ¬ß3.6 defaulted to (c) for the per-museum dedup-prevention property ; (a) is documented fallback.
